name: discover_commands
desc: Search for Revit commands by describing what you need to do. Returns command IDs, summaries, and usage hints. Use the returned command_id with execute_command to run the command. Example: 'create section views' returns SectionCreatorCommand etc.

parameters.name: objective
parameters.description: Describe what you need — e.g. 'create section views for corridors' or 'tag all mechanical equipment'
